item.title: About the Collective
item.description:
Our Mission

We believe that individual peace is the foundation for planetary restoration. By synchronizing our breaths and intentions, we amplify our collective impact on the world’s most pressing causes.

The Collective

Common Good Cause Meditation (CGCM) is more than a platform. It’s a sanctuary for those who wish to contribute their presence to the global field of harmony. We coordinate synchronized sessions across time zones, ensuring that there is always someone, somewhere, meditating for the good of all.

item.title: Community Map
item.description:
Visualizing Presence

The Community Map shows our collective field in action. Each dot represents a fellow practitioner whose current breath and intention are aligned with the global field.

Global Expansion

From the Amazon rainforest to the bustling streets of Tokyo, our synchronized breaths create a worldwide connection that transcends borders and boundaries.

Collective Restoration

  • Active Points: Current participants aligned in real-time.
  • Historical Echoes: Past sessions that continue to resonate within their specific cause areas.
  • Projected Growth: The deepening and widening of our planetary healing network.

(A dynamic, live-updating map visualization is currently being cultivated. Check back soon for the visual field.)

item.title: Privacy
item.description:
Minimal Footprint

In the spirit of Zen, we strive for a minimal digital footprint. This platform is designed to be a sanctuary, free from data harvesting or intrusive tracking.

What we (don’t) collect

  • Personal Data: We do not require account creation, email sign-ups, or any personally identifiable information to participate in global meditations.
  • Cookies: We only use strictly necessary session cookies to maintain your theme preference and current audio mixer settings.
  • Impact Surveys: When you participate in and complete a meditation session, any “Impact” survey results are aggregated and anonymized. They are never tied to individual users.

Collective Data

Anonymous participation metrics are collected only to showcase the power of collective presence on our Impact and Community Map pages.

item.title: Amazonian Green Breath
item.description:
Breathing with the Forest

When we meditate for the Amazon, we meditate for ourselves. Our breath is inextricably linked to the health of the rainforest.

item.title: Full Moon Illumination
item.description:
Shining Light on the Self

Personal growth requires moments of absolute honesty. Use this lunar window to illuminate your path forward.

item.title: Gratitude Saturday: Weekly Appreciation
item.description:
Integrating the Week

Gratitude is the bridge that turns what we have into enough. Join us in this moment of integrated appreciation.

item.title: Indian Sunrise Solidarity
item.description:
Awakening Together

Starting the day with collective silence creates a ripple effect of calm that lasts throughout the week. Join your fellow citizens in this moment of shared presence.

item.title: Mindful Monday: Weekly Reset
item.description:
Navigating the Week

A week started in stillness is a week lived with purpose. Set your internal compass every Monday morning.

item.title: Planetary Healing Pulse
item.description:
Resonance of Care

When we come together in heart-coherence, the collective power of our intention is amplified beyond measure.

item.title: World Peace Day Synchronization
item.description:
The Power of Unity

The World Peace Day Synchronization is more than just a meditation; it’s a statement of global togetherness. When we breathe together, we bridge the gaps between cultures and continents.

item.title: Summer Solstice Global Unity
item.description:
Harmonic Resonance

The solstice is a window of peak opportunity for collective coherence. When we align our focus during this astronomical event, our impact is exponentially increased.

item.title: Inner Fire
item.description:
Inner Fire

Transform personal energy into action.

item.title: Ocean Restoration
item.description:
Ocean Restoration

Group intent for healing our oceans.

item.title: Universal Harmony
item.description:
Universal Harmony

Join the global synchronization for peace.
